storyBeat: 雨夜，門外傳來小小的聲音

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Tonight we learn the letters A to Z. Let's start!
questions.sentenceZh: 今晚我們先來認識 A 到 Z 這些字母，開始囉！
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶說：英文有 26 個字母，學會了才能讀故事喔！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each letter to what it stands for.
questions.explanationZh:
每個字母都有一個代表字：
🔑 A = apple 蘋果
🔑 B = ball 球
🔑 C = cat 貓
🔑 D = dog 狗

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Which one is an apple?
questions.question: Which one is an apple?
questions.explanationZh: apple = 蘋果 🍎！A 這個字母用 apple 來記，最好記了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Which one is a cat?
questions.question: Which one is a cat?
questions.explanationZh: cat = 貓 🐱！C 這個字母就用 cat 來記——跟奶奶院子裡的 Mochi 一樣！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: D is for dog.
questions.sentenceZh: D 代表狗。
questions.question: Which picture matches 'dog'?
options: fluffy dog running in a field
bright red apple on a tree
round yellow ball on the grass
optionsZh: 一隻毛茸茸的狗在草地奔跑
草地上一顆圓圓的黃球
questions.explanationZh: D is for dog！狗在草地上跑，就是這張圖。dog = 狗 🐶。

storyBeat: 院子裡，一隻濕濕的小貓

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Now let's count. One, two, three, four, five!
questions.sentenceZh: 現在來數數！一、二、三、四、五！
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶說：先數到 5，學完再繼續往下！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each number to its English word.
questions.explanationZh:
數字配配看：
🔑 1 = one
🔑 2 = two
🔑 3 = three
🔑 4 = four

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How many cats are here? 🐱🐱
questions.question: How many cats are here?
questions.explanationZh: 🐱🐱 — 數一數，有兩隻貓！two = 二。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: There are two stars.
questions.sentenceZh: 有兩顆星星。
questions.question: Which word matches the number of stars?
questions.explanationZh: 🌟🌟 — 兩顆星星，two = 二！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: There ___ five cats in the yard.
questions.sentenceHard: At that very moment there ___ five cats playing in the yard.
questions.question: Which word is correct?
questions.explanationZh:
five cats 是複數，所以用 are，不用 is。
完整句：There are five cats in the yard.

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each number phrase to its Chinese.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 one cat = 一隻貓
🔑 two dogs = 兩隻狗
🔑 five stars = 五顆星

storyBeat: 暖呼呼的，像抹茶糰子——叫你 Mochi 吧

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
先認識這 4 個字：
🔑 cat = 貓
🔑 rain = 雨
🔑 night = 夜晚
🔑 yard = 院子

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Grandma dried the cat with a warm towel.
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶拿了條溫溫的毛巾，輕輕把小貓身上的水擦乾。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandma dried the cat with a warm towel.
questions.sentenceZh: 奶奶用溫暖的毛巾把貓擦乾。
questions.questionEn: Did Grandma use a cold towel?
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶用的是「溫溫的」毛巾，不是冷的，所以答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The cat is soft and round like a mochi.
questions.sentenceZh: 小貓又軟又圓，就像糰子。
questions.question: Which word matches?
questions.explanationZh: 小貓軟軟的就像糰子，soft 就是「軟的」。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Soft and warm, like a little mochi. 'I will call you Mochi.'
questions.explanationZh: 軟軟的、暖呼呼的，就像一顆糰子。「那我就叫你 Mochi 吧！」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandma held the fluffy kitten and chose a name for her.
questions.sentenceZh: 奶奶抱著毛茸茸的小貓，給她取了名字。
questions.question: Why did Grandma choose the name Mochi?
options: Soft and round like a mochi
questions.explanationZh: 小貓軟軟圓圓的，就像抹茶糰子，所以奶奶叫她 Mochi。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandma picked up the wet cat and carried her inside.
questions.sentenceZh: 奶奶把濕透的貓抱起來，帶她進屋子。
questions.question: What did Grandma do with the wet cat?
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶把濕透的貓抱起來，帶她進屋子——那是溫暖和安全的地方。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandma smiled at the soft little cat.
questions.sentenceZh: 奶奶對著軟軟的小貓微笑。
questions.question: Pick the picture for smile
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶笑了，smile 就是微笑 😊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandma gave the cat a name.
questions.sentenceZh: 奶奶給貓取了一個名字。
questions.questionEn: Does the cat have a name now?
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶給小貓取了名字，所以現在有名字了，答 Yes。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The towel is warm.
questions.sentenceZh: 毛巾是暖暖的。
questions.question: Which word matches?
questions.explanationZh: 毛巾是暖的，warm 就是「暖」，選它！

questions.speaker: mochi
questions.sentence: Mochi. That is my name. I like it!
questions.explanationZh: Mochi——那是我的名字，我好喜歡！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Let's review the key words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
複習一下：
🔑 soft = 軟
🔑 warm = 暖
🔑 towel = 毛巾
🔑 name = 名字

storyBeat: 柴犬 Hana 來聞一聞——變成好朋友

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words for today's story.
questions.explanationZh:
先認識這 4 個字：
🔑 dog = 狗
🔑 friend = 朋友
🔑 tail = 尾巴
🔑 sniff = 聞

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Grandma has a dog. Her name is Hana.
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶還養了一隻狗，名字叫 Hana。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hana is a dog.
questions.sentenceZh: Hana 是一隻狗。
questions.question: Which word matches?
questions.explanationZh: 圖裡是一隻狗，所以選 dog。Hana 是一隻柴犬。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandma has a dog named Hana.
questions.sentenceZh: 奶奶有一隻叫 Hana 的狗。
questions.explanationZh: Hana 是狗，不是貓，所以答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hana wagged her tail. She was happy.
questions.sentenceZh: Hana 搖了搖尾巴，她很高興。
questions.question: Pick the picture for happy
questions.explanationZh: Hana 搖起尾巴，表示她很開心 😊，happy 就是「開心」。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Hana sniffed Mochi. Then she wagged her tail and licked Mochi's ear.
questions.explanationZh: Hana 聞了聞 Mochi，然後搖起尾巴，還舔了舔 Mochi 的耳朵。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hana sniffed Mochi. Then she wagged her tail and licked Mochi's ear.
questions.sentenceZh: Hana 聞了聞 Mochi，然後搖起尾巴，還舔了舔 Mochi 的耳朵。
questions.question: How did Hana greet Mochi?
questions.explanationZh: Hana 先用鼻子聞，然後搖起尾巴，高興地打招呼。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hana and Mochi are friends.
questions.sentenceZh: Hana 和 Mochi 是朋友。
questions.questionEn: Do Hana and Mochi like each other?
questions.explanationZh: Hana 和 Mochi 是朋友，互相喜歡，所以答 Yes。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Hana ran across the yard on her four soft paws.
questions.sentenceZh: Hana 用她四隻柔軟的腳掌跑過院子。
questions.question: What kind of animal body part does Hana run on?
questions.explanationZh: Hana 用柔軟的腳掌跑——她是一隻狗，有四隻 paws！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match these phrases from Hana's story.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 wag its tail = 搖尾巴
🔑 new friend = 新朋友
🔑 give a good sniff = 好好聞一聞

questions.speaker: hana
questions.sentence: Woof! A new friend. Welcome, Mochi!
questions.explanationZh: 汪！是新朋友！歡迎你，Mochi！尾巴搖搖！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Let's review the key words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
複習一下：
🔑 friend = 朋友
🔑 tail = 尾巴
🔑 sniff = 聞
🔑 welcome = 歡迎

storyBeat: 奶奶教 Mochi 認識顏色

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each color to its English word.
questions.explanationZh:
顏色配配看：
🔑 red = 紅色
🔑 blue = 藍色
🔑 yellow = 黃色
🔑 green = 綠色

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Grandma pointed at the flowers. 'Red, blue, yellow — can you say the colors?'
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶指著花朵說：「紅色、藍色、黃色——你會說這些顏色嗎？」

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Which one is red?
questions.question: Which one is red?
questions.explanationZh: 🍎 蘋果是紅色的，red = 紅色！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Which one is blue?
questions.question: Which one is blue?
questions.explanationZh: 🌊 海浪是藍色的，blue = 藍色！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandma's garden has pink flowers.
questions.sentenceZh: 奶奶的花園裡有粉紅色的花。
questions.question: Which word describes the flowers?
questions.explanationZh: 🌸 花是粉紅色的，pink = 粉紅。

questions.speaker: mochi
questions.sentence: Mochi looked at the red flower. Then the blue sky. Then the green grass.
questions.explanationZh: Mochi 看著紅色的花，然後是藍色的天空，還有綠色的草地。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Mochi looked at the red flower and then the blue sky.
questions.sentenceZh: Mochi 看著紅色的花，然後是藍色的天空。
questions.question: What color is the sky?
questions.explanationZh: 故事說天空是 blue（藍色）的！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandma pointed at the flowers. Red, blue, yellow — the garden was full of colors.
questions.sentenceZh: 奶奶指著花朵。紅色、藍色、黃色——花園裡充滿了各種顏色。
questions.question: What was the garden full of?
questions.explanationZh: 花園裡有紅色、藍色、黃色——充滿了各種顏色！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The grass in the yard is green.
questions.sentenceZh: 院子裡的草地是綠色的。
questions.questionEn: Is the grass a yellow color?
questions.explanationZh: 草地是綠色（green），不是黃色，所以答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The sky is ___ and the grass is green.
questions.sentenceZh: 天空是___，草地是綠色的。
questions.question: 滑一滑，選對的顏色
questions.explanationZh: 天空是藍色（blue）的，草地是綠色（green）的！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match these color phrases.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 red flower = 紅色的花
🔑 blue sky = 藍色的天空
🔑 green grass = 綠色的草地

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Let's review the colors from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
複習一下：
🔑 red = 紅色
🔑 blue = 藍色
🔑 yellow = 黃色
🔑 green = 綠色

storyBeat: 奶奶翻開一本英文書，開始說故事

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each greeting to its Chinese.
questions.explanationZh:
打招呼用的字：
🔑 Hello = 你好
🔑 Goodbye = 再見
🔑 Thank you = 謝謝
🔑 Please = 請

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: One night, Grandma opened a book.
questions.explanationZh: 有一天晚上，奶奶把一本書翻開了。

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: It was a book of stories. In English.
questions.explanationZh: 那是一本故事書，用英文寫的，厚厚一本。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Which emoji goes with 'hello'?
questions.question: Which emoji goes with 'hello'?
questions.explanationZh: 👋 揮手就是打招呼 — hello！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandma reads a book.
questions.sentenceZh: 奶奶讀一本書。
questions.question: Which word matches?
questions.explanationZh: 圖片是一本書，所以選 book 📖。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The book has many stories inside.
questions.sentenceZh: 書裡有很多故事。
questions.explanationZh: 書裡有很多故事，不是空的，所以答 No。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandma opened a thick book. 'Listen,' she said. 'I will read this to you tonight.'
questions.sentenceZh: 奶奶翻開一本厚厚的書。「聽好囉，」她說，「今晚我讀這個給你們聽。」
questions.question: What language is the book in?
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶說書裡的故事是用英文寫的，所以選 English。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Mochi loves to listen. Her ears go up!
questions.sentenceZh: Mochi 愛聽故事，她的耳朵豎起來了！
questions.question: Pick the picture for listen
questions.explanationZh: 聽故事要用耳朵，ear 就是「耳朵」👂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandma said hello to Mochi every morning.
questions.sentenceZh: 奶奶每天早上都跟 Mochi 打招呼。
questions.question: When did Grandma say hello to Mochi?
questions.explanationZh: 故事說奶奶每天早上打招呼，選「every morning」！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match the words.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 book = 書
🔑 story = 故事
🔑 English = 英文
🔑 read = 讀

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandma ___ a book every night.
questions.sentenceHard: Every single night without fail, Grandma ___ a book of stories aloud.
questions.question: Which word is correct?
questions.explanationZh:
Grandma 是第三人稱單數，現在式要加 -s，所以用 reads。
完整句：Grandma reads a book every night.

questions.speaker: mochi
questions.sentence: A story! I love stories. Tell me more!
questions.explanationZh: 故事！我最愛聽故事了！快說，快說！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Mochi and Hana listen to Grandma.
questions.sentenceZh: Mochi 和 Hana 聽著奶奶說故事。
questions.question: Which word matches?
questions.explanationZh: Mochi 和 Hana 在「聽」奶奶說故事，listen 就是「聽」。

storyBeat: 數字 6–10 與複習——全部都學會了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each number to its English word.
questions.explanationZh:
數字配配看：
🔑 6 = six
🔑 7 = seven
🔑 8 = eight
🔑 9 = nine

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Let's count to ten. Six, seven, eight, nine, ten!
questions.explanationZh: 我們來數到十：六、七、八、九、十！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How many stars are here? ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
questions.question: How many stars are here?
questions.explanationZh: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ — 數一數，有六顆！six = 六。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandma counts ten flowers in the garden.
questions.sentenceZh: 奶奶在花園裡數了十朵花。
questions.question: Which word matches 'ten' flowers?
questions.explanationZh: ten = 十！花園裡有十朵花。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandma keeps many story books on her shelf.
questions.sentenceZh: 奶奶的書架上有很多故事書。
questions.question: How many books does Grandma have on her shelf?
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶的書架上有八本書，eight = 八！

questions.speaker: mochi
questions.sentence: Mochi counted on her paws. One, two, three... ten! She did it!
questions.explanationZh: Mochi 用腳掌數數。一、二、三……十！她學會了！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Mochi counted on her paws. She went from one to ten without stopping.
questions.sentenceZh: Mochi 用腳掌數數，從一數到十，沒有停下來。
questions.question: What did Mochi do all the way to ten?
questions.explanationZh: Mochi 從一數到十，沒有停，她一直數下去！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Ten is the last number we learn today.
questions.sentenceZh: 十是我們今天學的最後一個數字。
questions.questionEn: Did Grandma count all the way up to ten?
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶從一數到十，ten（十）是最後一個數字，答 Yes！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match these number phrases.
questions.explanationZh:
🔑 six cats = 六隻貓
🔑 eight books = 八本書
🔑 ten flowers = 十朵花

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Grandma counted ___ flowers in the garden.
questions.sentenceZh: 奶奶在花園裡數了___朵花。
questions.question: 滑一滑，選對的數字
questions.explanationZh: Grandma 數了十朵花，ten = 十！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Mochi counted nine stars in the night sky.
questions.sentenceZh: Mochi 在夜空中數了九顆星星。
questions.question: How many stars did Mochi count?
questions.explanationZh: Mochi 數了九顆星，nine = 九！

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Final review — all ten numbers!
questions.explanationZh:
最後複習：
🔑 six = 六
🔑 seven = 七
🔑 eight = 八
🔑 ten = 十
